polymarket.title: Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?
Will Bitcoin dip to $62,500 in July?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need exactly one paragraph, start with Bullish:, Bearish:, or Mixed: followed by specific reasons. Mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words. Data: two prediction markets: Ethereum dip to $1,500 by Dec 31 2026: Yes 38% (vol $132,289). Bitcoin dip to $62,500 in July: Yes 38% (vol $82,010). Both have 38% probability of dip, implying 62% chance of not dipping. So sentiment is somewhat bullish (more likely not dip). Could be Mixed? Since both show similar probability, but overall chance of dip is less than 50%, indicating bullish bias. So start with Bullish: then reasons: 38% chance of ETH dip to $1.5k by end 2026, 38% chance of BTC dip to $62.5k in July, implying ~62% confidence prices stay above those levels, volumes show interest.
